summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be addressed in the diff. MapComponent.tsx includes invalidateSize() calls for first-render fixes (REQ-1) and journeyId-based schedule key for per-journey marker display (REQ-2). LocationMapExplorer.tsx and TraveloguePanel.tsx were updated to pass journey.title as journeyId. The file summary text in frontend-file-summaries.txt explicitly confirms both fixes are present. No hallucinated features or missing requirements detected based on available evidence.
